pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require this view name.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require these four columns (with 'project_status' normalized to 'status').
Task description and verifier.py explicitly require sorting by 'created_on' in 'desc' order.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically seeded OpenProject environment. The requirements for the new saved view (name 'PMO Portfolio', columns ['name', 'status', 'description', 'created_on'], and sort order 'created_on' descending) exactly match both the explicit prompt instructions and the scoring logic in verifier.py.
